channel.title: llama-conductor blog
channel.description: deterministic routing, grounded reasoning, and operator notes

item.title: The Boys are back in town
item.description: As someone with ASD, I have terrible tendency to take people at their word. If you say X, I assume you mean X (not Y) and act from that basis. That's caused me some...problems...over the years.

item.title: I'd like to show you my...ass
I hate YAML.
item.description: After getting sick of baked-in, pre-trained model priors (No Qwen, that's NOT what vibe-coding means. That's not what abliteration means. That's not what any of this means!) I decided to add in a "clever little feature" Cheatsheets - see: N

item.title: Mom, can we get ChatGPT? Mom: we have ChatGPT at home
item.description: As you may (or may not) be aware, there is a current fun meme test going around (as of 02.26.26) that purports to challenge LLM reasoning abilities and world models.
